    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages

    T

    Transaction - Class in app.models
    Represents a financial transaction for a user.
    Transaction(int, double, String) - Constructor for class app.models.Transaction
    Creates a new transaction for a specific user.
    TransactionController - Class in app.controllers
    Controller class responsible for handling transaction-related requests and delegating them to the TransactionService.
    TransactionController() - Constructor for class app.controllers.TransactionController
     
    TransactionService - Class in app.services
    Service class responsible for handling user transactions.
    TransactionService() - Constructor for class app.services.TransactionService
     
    TransactionUI - Class in app.ui
    User Interface class responsible for handling transaction input.
    TransactionUI(Stage, User) - Constructor for class app.ui.TransactionUI
    Constructs the TransactionUI with required dependencies.
